name: dAlba UV Sunscreen Primer (Mixed Skin)
pros: Multi-purpose formula works as sunscreen, primer, and concealer in one
Excellent value at ¥2,610 with 20% points back; competitive vs. Western brands
Strong popularity (4.43★ from 1495 reviews) and easy to find on Rakuten
cons: Instructions and shade descriptions primarily in Japanese; guessing shade names is difficult
Mixed reviews on coverage consistency—some find it sheer, others find it buildable
shortDescription: Korean multi-use UV primer with sheer coverage—popular, affordable, Rakuten favorite.
review: dAlba's UV primer is a cult hit among Japan-based foreigners for its versatility and price. At under ¥2,610 with point rewards, it's one of the best-value multi-taskers available. The 4.43★ rating reflects solid performance, though you'll need to message customer service or use Google Translate to confidently pick your shade. Good for combination skin and those who want a lightweight base.
